working_tree: The benchmark executable was built from the implementation worktree later committed without content changes as 0853db93d7128983faf61c8acdb0d37cc58c665c. Full profile validation was run after that commit.

benchmark_protocol.source_generation: Each source pattern was generated once in a separate process at DEFLATE level 6. Warm-up and measured benchmark processes reused that deterministic source.
benchmark_protocol.representative_policy: Measured run nearest total_editor_ms median; earliest run breaks ties. Metric medians are independently calculated from all measured runs.
benchmark_protocol.verification: Every warm-up and measured output passed output-plan accounting, source/output CRC and logical-size checks, and exact compressed-payload equality for planned raw-copy entries. The representative output for every case opened with openpyxl; formula cases also preserved the external hyperlink target.

qualification: Elapsed wall time is system-sensitive. Process CPU is measured around process-wide writer intervals and minizip calls, includes backend bookkeeping, and is quantized by the Windows accounting source. Claims are restricted to medians from the recorded same-machine protocol.
